title: ranunculus montanus var. alpicola
intro: Ranunculus montanus var. alpicola, also known as alpine buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the alpine buttercup is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
